breakdown.creativeCore: Aesthetic Social Media Link-in-Bio Grid：A 6-panel promotional grid with a footer, typically used as a stylized link-in-bio menu or service overview for creators.
breakdown.subject: 人物

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: minimalist]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: soft light]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
